sourceBio: Google’s home for our latest AI tools and experiments.
title: Google Labs · @GoogleLabs

sentences.text: Have you explored Project Genie yet? 🌎 We just launched a huge set of updates!
You can now simulate worlds grounded in @GoogleMaps Street View, manage your creations in a new library, and share them externally.
Let's dive in: 1️⃣ Street View Grounding: You can now generate worlds starting from real places!

Just tap the Maps pin to choose a location in the US and you can pick a style like "Desert Sands" or "Ocean World." Describe your character, and Genie ties your starting location to real-world imagery.
2️⃣ Library: You can now store and organize your generated worlds.
Easily explore past creations or remix your favorites to iterate on your ideas.
3️⃣ External sharing: You can now share your generated worlds.
Anyone can watch a video preview of your world, and Ultra subscribers can explore or remix them.
Check out a shared world here: ✨ And now, Project Genie is gradually rolling out to all eligible Google AI Ultra subscribers globally (18+).
Jump in and start creating today!

paragraphs.zh: 你已经体验过 Project Genie 了吗？🌎 我们刚刚发布了一大波更新！现在，你可以基于 @GoogleMaps Street View 模拟世界，在新的 library（资料库）中管理你的创作，并将它们对外分享。来看看具体内容：1️⃣ Street View Grounding：你现在可以从真实地点出发生成世界了！只需点按 Maps 图钉，在美国选择一个位置，然后挑选一种风格，比如 “Desert Sands” 或 “Ocean World”。再描述一下你的角色，Genie 就会把你的起始地点与现实世界图像关联起来。2️⃣ Library：你现在可以保存并整理自己生成的世界。你可以轻松浏览过去的作品，或者 remix（再混编）你最喜欢的内容，持续迭代你的想法。3️⃣ External sharing：你现在可以分享自己生成的世界。任何人都可以观看你世界的视频预览，而 Ultra 订阅用户还可以进一步探索或 remix 它们。来这里看看一个已分享的世界：✨ 另外，Project Genie 现已开始向全球所有符合条件的 Google AI Ultra 订阅用户（18+）逐步开放。现在就加入并开始创作吧！

sentences.text: From text-to-video to Omni, agent, and Tools - what a ride it has been. 🚀 Keep pushing the boundaries!

paragraphs.zh: @FlowbyGoogle，周年快乐！从 text-to-video 到 Omni、agent 和 Tools——这一路真是精彩非凡。🚀 继续突破边界！迈向第二年。⚡

sentences.text: Finally: Computational Discovery, powered by AlphaEvolve & our Empirical Research Agent (ERA).
This agentic research engine generates and evaluates thousands of code variations, unlocking invaluable data to help discover advanced models and algorithms in a fraction of the time.

paragraphs.zh: 最后是：由 AlphaEvolve 和我们的 Empirical Research Agent (ERA) 驱动的 Computational Discovery。这一 agentic（智能体驱动的）研究引擎会生成并评估成千上万种代码变体，释放出极具价值的数据，从而帮助我们以原来一小部分的时间发现先进模型和算法。你可以在这里探索这些工具：
